allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('haptics:', p.dependencies['expo-haptics'], 'av:', p.dependencies['expo-av']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5; Get-ChildItem "$env:ProgramFiles\\nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5)
PowerShell(& "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvm\\author-nvm.exe" list 2>&1; Get-Item "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, LinkType, Target)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvm" | Select-Object Name, Mode; Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs")
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'dotnet|Glanz' } | Select-Object Id, Name, Path)

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "Passme123!"; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\16\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -d glanz_db -c "SELECT key, value FROM `"SystemSettings`" WHERE key LIKE 'booking%';" 2>&1)

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5289/api/Auth/login" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"admin@glanz.qa","password":"Admin123!"}'; $token = $login.token; $workers = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5289/api/Auth/workers" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; $workers | Select-Object id, firstName, lastName, shiftStart, shiftEnd, workingDays | ConvertTo-Json)
